caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, light-colored suspenders, a reddish bow tie, and a large, grey, sculpted wig sits in a podcast studio. He wears glasses and black headphones. In front of him is a black microphone on a boom arm. The background features walls adorned with framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with "LEE" printed on it. To his left and right, on-screen graphics display the logo "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. Initially, his hand is low and open; as the sequence progresses, he raises his hand toward his head, eventually touching the side of his wig. His facial expression remains focused as he continues to talk throughout the scene.
